title: Helix Real Pass 001
summary: First real review pass using agent debug minimal spawn and camera presets.
reasoning: I used the new agent debug mode (K spawn + camera presets) to produce quick wide-angle captures. The current helix still does not match the toy yet: curvature is present but vertical loop structure and multi-level overlap are not there. This is a baseline real pass before the next geometry iteration.
nextSteps: Increase helix vertical separation and add second revolution option
Shape entry/exit transitions to mimic toy loop connectors
Capture and republish pass 002 for approve/decline
